metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

bypass.reason: Test file — lives in tests/ by convention, not in the 3-layer app structure. Test files are exempt from layer architecture standard.
Test file — imports handler module directly for unit testing. Tests need direct access to monkeypatch module-level attributes and verify handler behavior.
Same-branch handler utility import — parse_frontmatter is a shared parsing function needed by both discovery and loader handlers
Same-branch handler utility import — template.py provides copy/get functions used only by creator_handler
Conditional import holder — yaml is assigned via 'import yaml' on success or stays None. Not a constant, just a module reference variable
Public API functions — used by test_registry.py and available for external callers; part of the registry module's contract

DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — ported-but-unwired from the 9k-line Dev-Pass telegram port. chunk_text (long-message splitting) and on_response (response hook) await wiring; on_response is a pending Wave-2 design call. See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — multi-bot listing helper, ported-but-unwired pending multi-bot wiring. See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — used by the response router to match CWD→bot; awaits the response_router wiring (td-38 import-vs-delete). See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — branch-plugin response hook, ported-but-unwired; pending Wave-2 on_response design call (td-38). See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — config accessors/validator ported-but-unwired, pending wiring. See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — file up/download feature ported-but-unwired, pending wiring. See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — response-router helpers, pending the response_router import-vs-delete design call (td-38). See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — interactive tmux session management, ported-but-unwired pending wiring (td-38 tmux). See README → Ported-but-unwired.

notes.usage: Add entries to 'bypass' list to exclude specific violations

example.reason: Circular dependency - logger cannot import CLI

fields.standard: Standard name: cli, imports, naming, etc. (required)
fields.lines: Optional - specific line numbers to bypass
